heading: Basic entitlement
label: 1141 Basic entitlement
text: The surviving spouse, child or children, and dependent parent or parents of any veteran who died before , as the result of injury or disease incurred in or aggravated by active military, naval, air, or space service, in line of duty, during other than a period of war, shall be entitled to receive compensation as hereinafter provided in this subchapter.January 1, 1957
notes: Amendments2021— substituted “air, or space service” for “or air service”.Pub. L. 116–2831991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83section 341 of this title1976— substituted “spouse” for “widow”.Pub. L. 94–4331971— struck out eligibility clause when the veteran died after , under circumstances described in .Pub. L. 92–197section 417(a) of this titleApril 30, 1957
